title: Task Claim
description: Payload an agent sends when it picks up a task from the queue

taskId.description: Unique identifier of the task being claimed

agentName.description: Name of the agent claiming the task (e.g. roy, moss, jen)

claimedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the claim was made

estimatedTokens.description: Agent's estimated token budget for completing this task

instanceId.description: Optional worktree / process instance identifier for parallel agents
